name: logo-wall
title: Logo Wall
description: A trusted-by wall of placeholder lettermark logos that fades and scales into place with a deterministic per-cell stagger.

variables.label: Rows
variables.description: Number of logo rows in the wall.

variables.label: Columns
variables.description: Number of logo columns in the wall.

variables.label: Stagger
variables.description: Delay between consecutive logo cell entrances.
